subject: Rocky Helmet — a rugged stone-textured helmet with yellow accents resting on a surface
description: A helmet constructed from rough, rocky or stone-like material sits as the central object. The helmet has a rounded dome shape with visible rocky texture across its surface and yellow-gold accents or trim along the edges. It rests on what appears to be a neutral or light-colored surface. The item reads as primitive or nature-made — stone and rock as protective gear. No figure is present; this is an item close-up.
